jcr:content.jcr:title: About Us
jcr:content.jcr:description: About Lumina Noventis — 40 years of precision measurement excellence

text.text:
Our Story

Founded in 1984 in Zurich, Switzerland, Lumina Noventis began as a small team of physicists and engineers passionate about pushing the boundaries of measurement science. Today, we are a global leader in precision test and measurement with over 4,500 employees across 28 countries.

Our Mission

To empower engineers and scientists with the world's most accurate, reliable, and intelligent measurement instruments — enabling breakthroughs in telecommunications, aerospace, automotive, and semiconductor technology.

Key Milestones

  • 1984 — Founded in Zurich; first product: a 40 GHz scalar network analyzer
  • 1992 — Expanded to Japan and North America
  • 2001 — Introduced world's first 110 GHz vector network analyzer
  • 2015 — Launched cloud-connected DataPilot analytics platform
  • 2022 — Crossed 3,000 enterprise customers in 60 countries
  • 2024 — Launched AI-powered LuminaSoft 4.0
